entries.claim_text: GNN-RAG framework figure: GNN reasons over a dense subgraph to retrieve candidate answers and reasoning paths, verbalized for LLM RAG.
entries.quoted_snippet: The GNN reasons over a dense subgraph to retrieve candidate answers, along with the corresponding reasoning paths

entries.claim_text: Landscape of KGQA methods figure: GNN-based vs LLM-based (ToG, RoG) retrieval and reasoning.
entries.quoted_snippet: GNN-based methods reason on dense subgraphs as they can handle complex and multi-hop graph information

entries.claim_text: 訓練時只有問題—答案配對，沒有標註「通往答案的路徑」
entries.quoted_snippet: question-answer pairs are given for training, but not the ground-truth paths

entries.claim_text: RAG 在 KGQA 上的表現高度取決於「檢索到哪些事實」
entries.quoted_snippet: RAG's performance highly depends on the KG facts that are retrieved

entries.claim_text: GNN 雖然不像 LLM 那樣理解自然語言，但它天生擅長處理複雜的圖結構
entries.quoted_snippet: a GNN reasons over a dense KG subgraph to retrieve answer candidates for a given question

entries.claim_text: \omega(q, r)\cdot \mathbf{m}_{vv'}^{(l)}
entries.quoted_snippet: \omega(q, r) \cdot \vm_{vv'}^{(l)}

entries.claim_text: GNN 把 KGQA 視為節點分類問題
entries.quoted_snippet: KGQA can be regarded as a node classification problem

entries.claim_text: GNN 的求和運算子（sum-operator）就能「過濾掉」無關資訊
entries.quoted_snippet: selecting question-relevant facts and filtering-out question-irrelevant facts through

entries.claim_text: 他們訓練兩個 GNN，一個用 SBERT
entries.quoted_snippet: we train two separate GNN models, one using pretrained LMs, such as  SBERT

entries.claim_text: 作者對開源可訓練的模型（一個 LLaMA2-Chat-7B）做 RAG prompt tuning
entries.quoted_snippet: A LLaMA2-Chat-7B model is fine-tuned based on the training question-answer pairs

entries.claim_text: 量測「Answer Coverage」
entries.quoted_snippet: We train two different GNNs, a deep one

entries.claim_text: 在 2-hop 問題上，深 GNN 用最少的 token
entries.quoted_snippet: deep GNNs ($L=3$) can handle the complex graph structure

entries.claim_text: 把兩者檢索到的推理路徑取聯集
entries.quoted_snippet: we take the union of the reasoning paths retrieved by the two retrievers

entries.claim_text: 中位輸入 token 只有 144 / 207
在 WebQSP 上以 7B 模型全面超過 ToG+GPT-4 的 82.6
entries.quoted_snippet: we estimate ToG+GPT-4 has an overall cost above

entries.claim_text: 任何下游方法的上限都被子圖擷取步驟卡死
論文沒有給出誤差棒或多次隨機種子的變異
這更接近一次設計良好的系統整合與經驗發現
entries.quoted_snippet: We employ RoG~\citep{luo2024rog} for RAG-based prompt tuning

entries.claim_text: 要外推到一般開放領域 RAG 仍有明顯落差
